Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heart of Nakothi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Heart of Nakothi is the heart of the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object used to raise or bind an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Chronicler was clutching the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an organ that squirts gray-green blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object that people want to use to crown a new Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart is an artifact of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor kept the Heart of Nakothi at bay for over one and a half thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — The Heart of Nakothi is considered indispensable for the crew's escape from the gallows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object that the Consultants intend to destroy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — The Heart of Nakothi has grown stronger since Calder last saw it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object that sings and can be bonded with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object Naberius Clayborn raises into the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Nakothi is a vile organ that erodes the mind and pries at Reader’s senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Shera took the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Heart of Nakothi eroded Naberius' mind.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Heart of Nakothi is described as a gray heart with veins of green that pumps sludge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackwatch is hunting for the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object Shera wants to keep buried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Nakothi's Heart is a target of mining.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Nakothi’s Heart is an object that Shera and Meia are on a mission to retrieve or destroy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Nakothi’s Heart is a pulsing, gray-green mass the size of a fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Watchmen were digging at Nakothi’s Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shera wants to prevent a Heart of Nakothi from escaping into the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart of Nakothi is being cut free from its bonds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The characters are present to protect Nakothi’s Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object held by Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart of Nakothi is a pulsing object that laughs with distant malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor used the Heart of Nakothi for centuries without ill effects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Nakothi's Heart can be destroyed by a left-hand shear invested with enough Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Destroying the Heart without draining its power releases Nakothi's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Destroying the Heart might kill and resurrect everyone on the Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — A Heart of Nakothi is a sickly, gray-green, still-beating heart that allows the Emperor to live forever.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Nakothi’s Heart has a song that can be heard and croons messages to those nearby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Nakothi's Heart is an object that whispers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Nakothi's Heart spews whispers from a closed chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Heart of Nakothi is kept in a pewter cage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Heart of Nakothi is kept in a box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Nakothi's Heart can be bound with rags that are invested to restrain power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor clutches the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object on the island.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Heart of Nakothi is a concept or object that Jerri compares a mass of gray-green flesh to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder threw Nakothi’s Heart into the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Nakothi's Heart was used to build the organism Kelarac created.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Heart of Nakothi was involved in a debacle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an object that Calder delivered.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Consultants have known about the Heart of Nakothi for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Heart of Nakothi has vanished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor might lose himself to the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Syphren's voice is similar to the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Calder Marten helped unearth the second Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Nakothi's Heart is a component that can bring the Emperor back to life via the Dead Mother's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Heart of Nakothi is an entity that croons a terrible song and whispers to be reborn.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor used a Heart of Nakothi to maintain his life.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart of Nakothi might be speaking through the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — The Heart of Nakothi was stabbed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera's shears hold Elder Intent from the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Heart of Nakothi is a lump of gray-green flesh.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
